answer: Bank withdrawals may take 1 to 3 business days after approval [Cash withdrawal processing §cash_withdrawal_processing_para_2].
No, it is not expected. Reset links expire after 30 minutes [Password reset and account recovery §password_reset_and_account_recovery_para_2].
No, support agents cannot see or manually reveal user passwords for security reasons [Password reset and account recovery §password_reset_and_account_recovery_para_3].

No, a utility bill from 8 months ago will not work for proof of address because utility bills older than 6 months are not accepted [Document verification requirements §document_verification_requirements_para_3].
No, demo profit cannot be withdrawn [Demo account behaviour §demo_account_behaviour_para_3].
